description: TaxMate AU provides conservative Australian tax-prep support, official ATO source refresh, finance review, calculation scaffolds, and accountant-facing output workflows. It is not professional advice or an ATO-endorsed product.

defaultPrompt: Review these tax expenses conservatively for my accountant.
interface.longDescription: TaxMate AU is an Australian tax-prep plugin for Codex. It keeps source-backed ATO research, finance review, calculators, workbook generation, and future taxpack output as separate skills over a shared Go backend and official ATO source pack. It is a preparation aid, not professional tax, legal, accounting, financial, BAS-agent, or registered-tax-agent advice, and is not affiliated with or endorsed by the Australian Taxation Office.

name: taxmate-au
